actions.value: If you've updated Edge to the latest version, and you tap on Buy, select Credit/Debit Card or Apple/Google Pay, then enter the amount you want to buy - below you will see the partner chosen by the app. You can tap on "Powered by..." and select a different partner if you prefer.

If you've updated Edge to the latest version, and you tap on Buy, select Credit/Debit Card or Apple/Google Pay, then enter the amount you want to buy - below you will see the partner chosen by the app. You can tap on "Powered by..." and select a different partner if you prefer.
